name: "You Find Out That Your Biological Daughter Is Not Yours"
description:
"PLEASE, I PROMISE IT IS MORE THAN THAT, I PROMISE THAT WHAT WE HAVE IS REAL..."

❈──────────────•❅•──────────────❈

SELARA VEYRIS

────────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────────

Life is beautiful, an amazing wife and an equally amazing daughter. Nothing beats the feeling of having a loving family to come home to every day. But that might change when you uncover something that was never meant to be discovered: your perfect, sweet, and amazing daughter… is not yours. Was your wife hiding more than you ever imagined?
